user.title: GHL ProfiLux — Important warnings
user.description:
⚠️ **Unofficial integration — use at your own risk**

This integration communicates with the ProfiLux using the local protocol reverse-engineered by the community (not documented by GHL).

**Before continuing, make sure you understand:**
- Write commands (sockets, Feed Pause, Maintenance) directly modify the controller. Incorrect use may put the aquarium and its inhabitants at risk.
- GHL may release a firmware update that breaks this integration without notice.
- The authors are not affiliated with GHL and accept no liability for damage to the aquarium, equipment, or animals.
- Only use with sockets already set to manual mode in the ProfiLux. Do not interfere with sockets controlled by timers or automatic functions.

data.accept_risks: I have read the warnings and accept all risks

connect.title: GHL ProfiLux — Local connection
connect.description:
Enter the IP address of your ProfiLux and its login credentials.

{ws_note}

data_description.host: IP address of the ProfiLux on your LAN (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.username: Username configured on the controller (default: admin).

error.disclaimer_required: You must accept the warnings to continue.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials (HTTP 401). Check username and password on the controller.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the ProfiLux. Check the IP, ensure the controller is reachable, and that the WebSocket interface is enabled.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check Home Assistant logs for details.
